title: The Senate Shadow
body: Under forged maintenance credentials, the crew slipped into a sealed archive below the former Senate district. Sela identified a hidden routing node that had been quietly relaying old Republic intelligence traffic to an unknown receiver.

Vera distracted an ISB inspection team while Nix cut through the archive's physical lockouts. The data cache revealed references to a forgotten contingency network and a dead senator whose accounts were still moving credits.
They left Coruscant with more questions than answers, but the final packet contained coordinates for a safehouse on a planet erased from public records.
